full_text:
Yin Li (Desi) 殷禮 (德嗣)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Yin Li (殷禮), styledDesi (德嗣), was born in Wu. Of humble family and lacking strength but was a quiet, thoughtful and admired Confucian scholar. Yin Li was affiliated with the Wu Kingdom.
